nasb.text: He did evil in the sight of the Lord, according to the abominations of the nations whom the Lord dispossessed before the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And he did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, according to the despicable practices of the nations whom the Lord drove out before the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，好像耶和華在以色列人面前趕走的民族所行的可憎惡的事。

ccb.text: 他做耶和华视为恶的事，效法耶和华在以色列人面前赶走的外族人的可憎行径。
